Policies and Documents

Northstowe Karate club has the following policies in place, including a safeguarding policy and privacy policy.

Safeguarding Policy

Our safeguarding statement can be found here. Our policy can be found here

Privacy Policy

Our privacy policy can be found here

Complaints Policy

Our complaints policy can be found here

Assumption of Risk

Practicing any martial arts comes with a certain level of risk. By participating in classes, you agree to have read and understood (or on behalf of a student under 18 as a parent/guardian) our assumption of risk document and are happy to proceed without warranty or guarantee.

Details of our photo/video polices can be found here
